concerns.text: FR-001 requires compiling data from NIST OR CRC, but no task explicitly mentions fetching from CRC Handbook. T012 only mentions NIST.
FR-002 requires documentation of crystal vs hydrated radii, but this documentation isn't explicitly linked to a task. T014 addresses the logic but not the documentation.
FR-003 specifies no GPU dependencies, but this isn't explicitly verified in any task. A test task verifying CPU-only execution would be beneficial.
FR-004 requires validation against ≥5 reference cases, but no task explicitly defines or implements this validation process. T026 mentions validation, but doesn't specify the number of cases.
FR-005 requires RMSE stratification, but no task explicitly confirms this stratification is performed and saved to the output file.
FR-006 requires multiple-comparison correction, but the choice between Bonferroni or Benjamini-Hochberg isn't addressed in a task.
FR-007 requires sensitivity analysis over specific RMSE thresholds, but no task explicitly implements this sensitivity analysis.
FR-008 requires documentation of uncertainty bounds, but T015 only addresses *populating* the column, not documenting the source of the uncertainty.
FR-009 requires generating three specific diagnostic plots, but no task explicitly confirms all three plots are generated and saved.
SC-001 requires ≥30 complete ion-solvent pairs, but no task explicitly verifies this count in the compiled dataset.
SC-002 requires validation within 1% tolerance, but no task explicitly checks this tolerance during validation.
SC-003 requires RMSE < 5 kcal/mol and correlation > 0.8, but no task explicitly calculates or validates these metrics.
SC-004 requires p < 0.05, but no task explicitly checks this threshold.
SC-005 requires measuring uncertainty coverage, but no task explicitly calculates this percentage.
SC-006 requires generating three diagnostic plots, but no task explicitly confirms all three plots are generated.
T009 mentions setting up state checksumming, but doesn't explicitly state that checksums are *generated* and saved for all relevant files.
T014 addresses a reviewer concern, but doesn't explicitly state that the documentation of the radius type is created.
T015 addresses a reviewer concern, but doesn't explicitly state that the source of the uncertainty is documented.
T017 addresses a reviewer concern, but doesn't explicitly state that the temperature and instrument metadata are documented.
T023 addresses a reviewer concern, but doesn't explicitly state that the radius type selector is documented.
T024 addresses a reviewer concern, but doesn't explicitly state that the limitation of the coordination number correction is documented.
T032 addresses a reviewer concern, but doesn't explicitly state that the error analysis is separated.
T038 addresses a reviewer concern, but doesn't explicitly state that the documentation is created.
